hooks.command: [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}' || true

[ -f tests/test_docs_baseline.py ] && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"docs-baseline: Shared repo baseline lives in docs/product-definition.md, docs/hotel-onboarding-data.md, docs/architecture-audit.md, docs/roadmap.md, docs/multi-agent-workflow.md, docs/security-baseline.md, docs/tooling-stack.md, app/AGENTS.md, frontend/AGENTS.md, tests/AGENTS.md, and tests/test_docs_baseline.py. Validate docs/link drift with python -m pytest tests/test_docs_baseline.py -q."}}' || true
